scripts.dev:web: cd apps/web && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 bun run dev
scripts.dev:web:local: cd apps/web && NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000 NEXT_PUBLIC_SOLANA_CLUSTER=localnet NEXT_PUBLIC_SOLANA_RPC_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8899 bun run dev
scripts.seed:demo: cd apps/api && ANCHOR_PROVIDER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8899 bun run seed
